title: Moosend Review 2025: Features, Pricing & Honest Verdict
meta_description: Is Moosend worth it in 2025? We break down pricing, features, pros and cons so you can decide.
h1: Moosend Review 2025: Everything You Need to Know
intro: Moosend is email marketing and automation for all that positions itself for small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost. Founded in 2011, it has become one of the most recognised platforms in the email marketing space. In this review we cover what it does well, where it falls short, and who should actually use it.
verdict: Moosend is a solid choice for small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost. Its free tier is genuinely useful. The main trade-off is between its particular strengths and the limitations that make alternatives worth considering for some users.
pros: Good fit for small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost
cons: Can get expensive at higher subscriber counts
Some features locked to higher tiers
pricing_summary: Moosend offers a free plan, with paid plans from $9/month. Pricing typically scales with subscriber count.
best_for_detail: Moosend works best for small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost. If you fit that profile, the feature set aligns well. If you need something different, check the alternatives section.

faq.a: Yes, Moosend has a free plan supporting up to 1000 subscribers. This makes it accessible for new senders testing the platform.

faq.q: What is Moosend best used for?
faq.a: Moosend is best for small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost. Its standout features include unlimited emails, automation workflows, landing pages, which suit this use case well.
Moosend is generally beginner-friendly. The interface is straightforward for basic campaigns, though advanced automation features have a learning curve.

faq.q: Does Moosend have an affiliate program?
faq.a: Yes, Moosend runs an affiliate program paying 30% recurring. This is worth considering if you plan to recommend the platform to your audience.
